EPA-ng
======

# Available modules


The overview below shows which EPA-ng installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using EPA-ng, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load EPA-ng/0.3.8-GCC-12.3.0
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
